title: action.failed.v1
description: SPEC I (Wave I, AMD-03) — Action Platform envelope: an action FAILED (rejected pre-execution, or errored during execution). Registered in Apicurio as brain/action.failed.v1 (JSON Schema artifact under FULL_TRANSITIVE, AMD-03 R1). Partition key = brand_id (I-S01). SCAFFOLD ONLY — the fail-closed NotImplemented adapters make this the EXPECTED terminal envelope for any wired action today (error_code = 'NOT_IMPLEMENTED' or 'EXECUTOR_DISABLED'). PII (I-S02): error_message is operator-facing diagnostic text, never raw PII; money in payload is bigint minor + currency_code.

brand_id.description: Tenant key — brand_id-first (I-S01). Kafka partition key.

action_id.description: The action that failed. Idempotency key = (brand_id, action_id).

executor.description: The executor adapter targeted (matches an @brain/action-core ExecutorPort name).

execution_mode.description: Mode under which the action was attempted.

error_code.description: Stable machine-readable failure code (e.g. 'NOT_IMPLEMENTED', 'EXECUTOR_DISABLED', 'GOVERNANCE_BLOCKED', 'UPSTREAM_ERROR'). Scaffold adapters fail-closed with 'NOT_IMPLEMENTED' / 'EXECUTOR_DISABLED'.

error_message.description: OPTIONAL human/operator diagnostic text (no raw PII, I-S02).

payload.description: OPTIONAL echo of the attempted instruction body for triage (money = bigint minor + currency_code; no raw PII).

holdout_group.description: OPTIONAL incrementality cohort label (preserved across the lifecycle).

failed_at.description: OPTIONAL ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the failure.
